title: Serious Study Partner for Deep Learning Mathematics (Beyond the Basics) [D]
author: Reddit r/MachineLearning
summary: This Reddit post seeks a serious study partner to collaboratively master the advanced mathematical foundations of deep learning—including matrix calculus, probability theory, and optimization—beyond standard implementations. It emphasizes rigorous textbook- and paper-based learning (e.g., Goodfellow's 'Deep Learning') and active derivation/discussion of formulas, targeting conceptual depth over surface-level intuition. The collaboration values mutual technical contribution (e.g., PyTorch implementation, research ideation) and structured, high-fidelity knowledge co-construction.
